# Visual Studio Code 1.113

*Last updated: March 18, 2026*

Welcome to the 1.113 release of Visual Studio Code.

Happy Coding!

To try new features as soon as possible, [**download the nightly Insiders build**](https://code.visualstudio.com/insiders), which includes the latest updates as soon as they are available.

## March 18, 2026

- Add support for zooming in and out in the image carousel. [#302003](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/302003)
- The integrated browser now allows bypassing certificate errors for localhost HTTPS connections with self-signed certificates. [#298982](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/298982)
- Reveal in File Explorer now works correctly when connected to WSL. [#299491](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/299491)
- Improved screen reader labels for implicit context. [#301568](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/301568)

## March 16, 2026

- Debug launch configurations can now be hidden per-platform using the `"windows"`
, `"linux"` , or `"osx"` properties in `launch.json` . [#293394](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/issues/293394)

We really appreciate people trying our new features as soon as they are ready, so check back here often and learn what's new.
Title: Visual Studio Code 1.113
